attestation_audit_decision_surface.name: external_credential_source_face
attestation_audit_decision_surface.what_is_being_attested: The external credential reference resolves to the intended Dexter paper-live demo credential source for the bounded supervised window.
attestation_audit_decision_surface.minimal_evidence_shape: attestor name, reference label only, bounded window, verification timestamp, and a plain-language confirmation that the referenced credential source was resolved outside repo
attestation_audit_decision_surface.stale_when: the credential reference changes or the bounded supervised window rolls forward
attestation_audit_decision_surface.auditable_enough_when: the repo can point to a current attestation record for this face without exposing secret material
attestation_audit_decision_surface.current_audit_observation: A credential-source marker is visible in repo, but no current attestation names who resolved it, how it was checked, or when the check expires. The current input-attestation surface defines the face, but the repo still does not point to a current bounded-window attestation record or timestamped stale check for this face.

attestation_audit_decision_surface.name: venue_ref_face
attestation_audit_decision_surface.what_is_being_attested: The repo-visible venue reference points to the intended Dexter demo venue for the bounded supervised retry window.
attestation_audit_decision_surface.minimal_evidence_shape: attestor names, venue reference label, bounded window, verification timestamp, and explicit match confirmation between the marker and the intended venue
attestation_audit_decision_surface.stale_when: the venue reference changes, venue routing changes, or the supervised window is rescheduled
attestation_audit_decision_surface.auditable_enough_when: the venue attestation is current, explicit, and reviewable without requiring the reviewer to infer the mapping
attestation_audit_decision_surface.current_audit_observation: A venue marker is visible in repo, but no current attestation records which venue the upcoming supervised window is meant to hit. The current input-attestation surface defines the face, but the repo still does not point to a current bounded-window attestation record or timestamped stale check for this face.

attestation_audit_decision_surface.name: account_ref_face
attestation_audit_decision_surface.what_is_being_attested: The repo-visible account reference points to the intended Dexter paper-live demo account for the bounded supervised window.
attestation_audit_decision_surface.minimal_evidence_shape: attestor name, account reference label, bounded window, verification timestamp, and a statement that the external account binding was checked outside repo
attestation_audit_decision_surface.stale_when: the account reference changes or a different demo account is selected for the window
attestation_audit_decision_surface.auditable_enough_when: the account attestation makes the intended demo account explicit enough to reopen gate review
attestation_audit_decision_surface.current_audit_observation: An account marker is visible in repo, but no current attestation ties it to the intended demo account for the next supervised window. The current input-attestation surface defines the face, but the repo still does not point to a current bounded-window attestation record or timestamped stale check for this face.

attestation_audit_decision_surface.name: connectivity_profile_face
attestation_audit_decision_surface.what_is_being_attested: The intended connectivity profile can reach the intended Dexter demo venue and account during the bounded supervised window.
attestation_audit_decision_surface.minimal_evidence_shape: attestor names, connectivity profile label, verification timestamp, bounded window, and a short reachability result
attestation_audit_decision_surface.stale_when: network routing changes, connectivity profile changes, or the verification timestamp is outside the current window
attestation_audit_decision_surface.auditable_enough_when: the connectivity attestation is current enough that a gate reviewer can treat reachability as explicitly checked
attestation_audit_decision_surface.current_audit_observation: A connectivity-profile marker is visible in repo, but no current attestation records that the intended venue and account path was checked for the target window. The current input-attestation surface defines the face, but the repo still does not point to a current bounded-window attestation record or timestamped stale check for this face.

attestation_audit_decision_surface.name: operator_owner_face
attestation_audit_decision_surface.what_is_being_attested: One explicit operator owner is responsible for the full retry-gate review and bounded supervised window.
attestation_audit_decision_surface.minimal_evidence_shape: owner name or handle, verification timestamp, window label, and explicit ownership statement
attestation_audit_decision_surface.stale_when: the named owner changes or the supervised window changes
attestation_audit_decision_surface.auditable_enough_when: the owner attestation is explicit enough that gate recheck does not rely on unnamed responsibility
attestation_audit_decision_surface.current_audit_observation: The repo still does not point to one named operator owner for the full supervised window. The current input-attestation surface defines the face, but the repo still does not point to a current bounded-window attestation record or timestamped stale check for this face.

attestation_audit_decision_surface.name: bounded_start_criteria_face
attestation_audit_decision_surface.what_is_being_attested: The intended supervised start window, go/no-go owner, and abort owner are explicit and bounded for the next reviewable retry attempt.
attestation_audit_decision_surface.minimal_evidence_shape: planned start window, bounded window minutes, go/no-go owner, abort owner, verification timestamp, and explicit stop condition note
attestation_audit_decision_surface.stale_when: the scheduled window moves or ownership for go/no-go or abort changes
attestation_audit_decision_surface.auditable_enough_when: the bounded-start attestation makes timing and ownership explicit enough to reopen gate review
attestation_audit_decision_surface.current_audit_observation: The bounded window and stop model are fixed in repo, but no current attestation records start time, go/no-go owner, or abort ownership for the target window. The current input-attestation surface defines the face, but the repo still does not point to a current bounded-window attestation record or timestamped stale check for this face.

attestation_audit_decision_surface.name: allowlist_symbol_lot_reconfirmed
attestation_audit_decision_surface.what_is_being_attested: The explicit allowlist, default symbol, lot size, bounded window, and one-position cap were reconfirmed for the upcoming supervised window.
attestation_audit_decision_surface.minimal_evidence_shape: attestor name, verification timestamp, allowlist values, lot-size values, position cap, and a plain-language reconfirmation note
attestation_audit_decision_surface.stale_when: any guardrail value changes or the supervised window moves
attestation_audit_decision_surface.auditable_enough_when: the guardrail attestation is current enough that gate recheck can treat the bounded demo envelope as explicitly reconfirmed
attestation_audit_decision_surface.current_audit_observation: The bounded symbol, lot-size, window, and one-position guardrails parse cleanly from repo, but no current attestation confirms they were rechecked for the upcoming supervised window. The current input-attestation surface defines the face, but the repo still does not point to a current bounded-window attestation record or timestamped stale check for this face.

attestation_audit_decision_surface.name: manual_latched_stop_all_visibility_reconfirmed
attestation_audit_decision_surface.what_is_being_attested: `manual_latched_stop_all` remains visibly reachable on the bounded retry path for the next supervised window.
attestation_audit_decision_surface.minimal_evidence_shape: attestor name, verification timestamp, referenced stop-all surface, and a plain-language visibility confirmation
attestation_audit_decision_surface.stale_when: the stop-all surface changes or the window advances without reconfirmation
attestation_audit_decision_surface.auditable_enough_when: the stop-all visibility attestation is current enough to reopen gate review without assuming prior visibility still holds
attestation_audit_decision_surface.current_audit_observation: The blocked supervised baseline preserved `manual_latched_stop_all`, but no current attestation records who reconfirmed visibility for the next review window. The current input-attestation surface defines the face, but the repo still does not point to a current bounded-window attestation record or timestamped stale check for this face.

attestation_audit_decision_surface.name: terminal_snapshot_readability_reconfirmed
attestation_audit_decision_surface.what_is_being_attested: Terminal snapshot detail remains readable enough for the upcoming supervised retry window.
attestation_audit_decision_surface.minimal_evidence_shape: attestor name, verification timestamp, referenced snapshot surface, and a short readability confirmation
attestation_audit_decision_surface.stale_when: the snapshot format changes or the supervised window advances without reconfirmation
attestation_audit_decision_surface.auditable_enough_when: the snapshot-readability attestation is current enough that a gate reviewer can rely on terminal visibility without inference
attestation_audit_decision_surface.current_audit_observation: The baseline handoff shows terminal snapshot detail, but no current attestation records who rechecked readability for the next review window. The current input-attestation surface defines the face, but the repo still does not point to a current bounded-window attestation record or timestamped stale check for this face.

sub_agents.name: Anscombe
lines: Confirmed the input-attestation quartet should remain the accepted baseline until a complete attestation-audit quartet exists, then switch current report, status, proof, summary, and handoff pointers atomically.

Recommended that the audit surface carry the same attestation facts per row in one place: who attests, what is being attested, the minimum evidence shape, the stale rule, and what makes the face auditable enough.

Recommended fail-closed wording that stays observation-based: the repo may name the required face definitions, but retry-gate review remains blocked until each face points to a current bounded-window attestation record and stale check.

sub_agents.name: Euler
lines: Kept the attestation-audit boundary identical to the accepted input-attestation boundary: Dexter-only `paper_live`, frozen Mew-X `sim_live`, `single_sleeve`, `dexter_default`, allowlist-only, small-lot, one-plan, one-position, bounded supervision, and funded-live forbidden.

Recommended the smallest next-step cut: hold the current lane at `supervised_run_retry_gate_attestation_audit` while blocked, and expose `supervised_run_retry_gate` only as the audit-pass successor once retry-gate review can honestly reopen.

Confirmed there is no planner or adapter drift: `prepare / start / status / stop / snapshot` stays fixed, `manual_latched_stop_all` stays planner-owned, funded live stays forbidden, and Mew-X remains unchanged.

sub_agents.name: Parfit
lines: Scoped the smallest safe change set to docs, proof-generation script, generated artifacts, manifest/context/ledger updates, and tests; no `vexter/` runtime behavior changes are needed for this lane.

Recommended validating the generator plus the affected regression surfaces with `python3 scripts/run_demo_forward_supervised_run_retry_gate_attestation_audit.py` and focused `pytest` coverage on the supervised-run and bundle-layout tests.

Merge readiness depends on an atomic current-pointer switch to attestation audit, a regenerated tarball at the new bundle path, and a clean blocked decision that does not claim retry execution success or a reopened retry gate.
